title: BEM-917 worker request
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM917_UNIFIED_PROTOCOL_V2_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-917 UNIFIED SYSTEM IMPROVEMENT PROTOCOL V2 REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: update the unified BEM-916 protocol according to latest operator remarks.
Base:
- BEM-916 unified system improvement protocol.
- Operator remarks: Telegram must be configured to General Director, reports must use operator-selected periodicity with 1 hour default, reports must follow the reporting canon.
Required corrections:
1. Telegram target object:
- Telegram is not configured to a generic Curator.
- Telegram operator interface must be configured to General Director object OBJ-GD-001.
- The active receiving element is General Director Curator EL-CUR-GD-001.
- General Director then routes tasks/reports to Director OBJ-DIR-001, Worker OBJ-WRK-001, and their curators through the managed channel.
2. Reporting periodicity:
- Reports are sent with operator-selected periodicity.
- Current default is 1 hour.
- Operator can later change default report period through a Telegram command or configuration.
- The protocol must clarify that period changes update report configuration and must not introduce prohibited schedule triggers without operator approval.
3. Reporting canon:
- All Telegram reports must follow the canon: title line with BEM and time, stage X/Y percent, roadmap X/Y percent, checklist with proofs, and next-action table.
- Reports from Curator, Director and General Director must use the same canon with role-specific content.
4. Unified document:
- This must update the BEM-916 unified protocol, not create a standalone Telegram protocol.
Worker must confirm coherence, executability, and gates.
Expected status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
